creator: emz@norma.perm.ru
text:
Added updated port shar. Fixed all of the mentioned issues. Bumped the port version from upstream to 6.2.1.

As about the databases/redis - the binary installation itself doesn't conflict with redis. However, redis and keydb use the same port tcp/6379 when launched - don't know if this is worth CONFLICTING. www/nginx and www/apache24 don't CONFLICT considering the same port situation.
